claim_boundary: Frozen-package unittest import recovery only; not model quality, binding, Kd, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, Top7500, or production promotion.

legacy_102_test_contract.invocation: python HASH_BOUND_EXACT_FILE_RUNNER LEGACY_ROOT <exact thirteen tests/*.py relative paths> --verbosity 2

minimal_causal_change.new: V1.3.4 loads only the exact allowlisted regular test files with `importlib.util.spec_from_file_location` under private module names, then calls `unittest.TestLoader.loadTestsFromModule`; both legacy102 and new44 launchers use the same hash-bound adapter.
minimal_causal_change.old: V1.3.3 invoked exact relative test paths through `python -m unittest`; Python 3.11.14 converted them to `tests.*` imports, which were captured by an unrelated installed top-level `tests` package on bxcpu.
minimal_causal_change.scope: test import/discovery adapter, lifecycle version strings, test assertions, and hashes only

superseded_v1_3_3.failure: Python 3.11.14 installed tests package shadowed the repository tests namespace; 13/13 legacy modules failed import before any test body.
